name: Dom Yam Gung (Thai Shrimp Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the peppercorns and coriander roots.
2. Trim the root and tough layers from the lemon grass. Slice the first six inches thinly.
3. Bring 2 cups of stock to a boil.
4. Add the coriander paste, lemon grass, ginger, and shrimp to the boiling stock. Simmer for a few minutes.
5. Stir in the remaining stock and bring back to a boil.
6. Season with lime juice, fish sauce, and chilies.
7. Serve with chopped coriander sprinkled on top.
